summary: A USCIS Alien Registration Requirement (ARR) PSA titled 'Facing the Consequences' using branded title cards plus generic stock B-roll (handcuffs over a fingerprint card) under a plain instructional voiceover warning that failure to register makes one a priority for civil and criminal enforcement. It is a standard informational compliance promo with no music-driven or genre styling, so out of scope.
notable_text: ARR Alien Registration Requirement; FACING THE CONSEQUENCES; If you fail to comply, for civil and criminal enforcement; FOR MORE INFO: USCIS.GOV/ALIENREGISTRATION
